mapper.sql: sd.id, sd.student_id, sd.dormitory_id, sd.bed_number, sd.check_in_date, sd.check_out_date, sd.status, sd.change_reason, sd.remark, sd.created_at, sd.updated_at, s.student_no, u.real_name as student_name, c.class_name, d.building_id, b.building_no, b.building_name, d.dormitory_no, d.floor_number

FROM student_dormitory sd LEFT JOIN students s ON sd.student_id = s.id AND s.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN classes c ON s.class_id = c.id AND c.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN dormitories d ON sd.dormitory_id = d.id AND d.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN buildings b ON d.building_id = b.id AND b.deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE sd.deleted = 0 AND sd.student_id = #{studentId} AND sd.status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT
WHERE sd.deleted = 0 AND sd.dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND sd.status = 1 ORDER BY sd.bed_number

SELECT
WHERE sd.deleted = 0 AND sd.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY sd.check_in_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_dormitory WHERE dormitory_id = #{dormitoryId} AND status = 1 AND deleted = 0
